info.name: 👨‍👩‍👧 Family Management System
info.description: Complete testing suite for Family Management, Order Context, Membership Benefits & Admin Controls

item.name: 👤 Auth

request.description: Login as main member to get authentication token
Register as main member (will get memberId automatically)
Register family member (will be linked later)

item.description: Authentication endpoints for getting tokens and user IDs

item.name: 👨‍👩‍👧 Family Management

request.description: Sub-member ko family mein link karta hai using main member ka memberId
User ki family information deta hai - main member ya sub-member
Main member ko apne sub-members ki list deta hai
Sub-member family chhod deta hai aur independent ban jaata hai
Main member kisi sub-member ko family se remove kar deta hai
Member ID valid hai ya nahi check karta hai (public endpoint)

item.description: Family management endpoints for linking, viewing, and managing family members

item.name: 🛒 Cart (Family Context)

request.description: Apne liye cart mein item add karta hai

response.name: Success

request.description: Main member apne sub-member ke liye cart mein item add karta hai

response.name: Success
Error - Sub-Member Trying for Other

request.description: Cart item update karta hai with family validation
Cart se item remove karta hai with family validation
Pura cart clear karta hai with family validation

item.description: Cart operations with family context validation

item.name: 📦 Orders (Permission Logic)

request.description: Main member apne liye order create karta hai
Main member apne sub-member ke liye order create karta hai
Sub-member apne liye order create karta hai
Sub-member dusre ke liye order create karne ki koshish - fail hona chahiye

response.name: Error - Not Allowed

item.description: Order creation with family permission validation

item.name: 💳 Membership (Family Benefits)

request.description: Main member membership kharidta hai
Main member ka effective membership check karta hai
Sub-member ka effective membership check karta hai (inherited benefits)

response.name: Success - With Inherited Benefits

item.description: Membership operations with family benefit inheritance

request.description: User apne own address se checkout karta hai
Sub-member main member ka inherited address use karta hai
User manual address provide karke checkout karta hai
Admin saari families ki list deta hai
Admin kisi family se sub-member remove kar deta hai
Admin max sub-member limit enforce karta hai
Admin kisi user ko family se detach kar deta hai

item.name: 🔄 Complete Test Flow

request.description: Step 1: Main member register karta hai
Step 2: Sub-member register karta hai
Step 3: Sub-member family mein link hota hai
Step 4: Main member sub-member ke liye cart mein item add karta hai
Step 5: Main member sub-member ke liye order place karta hai

item.name: 6. Try Invalid Order (Sub → Other) - Should Fail

request.description: Step 6: Sub-member dusre ke liye order place karne ki koshish - fail hona chahiye
Step 7: Main member membership kharidta hai
Step 8: Sub-member ko inherited benefits milte hain ya nahi check karta hai
Step 9: Sub-member family chhod deta hai
Step 10: Verify sub-member ke benefits remove ho gaye hain

item.description: Complete end-to-end test flow for family management
